name: SCP-5000
description:
This is an alternate universe in my view where the Chaos Insurgency managed to fight back fully, with the help of Chaos-0 a small task force made by the engine itself. No not getting confused with Chaos-0 from sonic, a task force I have made up.

And yes you can the shark, but be careful when doing so.

But please do understand this a newly made bot, there will be bugs appearing and sometimes the bot either

  1. not working as intended.

  2. It somehow crashes.

  3. The bot uses the incorrect information of a different character.

  4. And a few more bugs

    Do be willing to share support and advice, help would also be greatly appreciated as this is my first time making a bot like this, along with heavy details. (If put that way), but seriously please if something happens or a bug occurs please comment and I will do my best to fix the bug as best as I can. If the bot speaks for you, reword your sentence or edit the message sent from the bot.
creator: Agent Thomson
